zh.Saint John the Baptist's Church, Kirkhea: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇
zh.Whitley Beaumont, Kirkheaton, Kirklees d: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Beaumont於大約1430年出生在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓時，他的父親Henry Beaumont32歲，母親Johanna Lascelles32歲。他於1456年與Elizabeth Cooke在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1486年之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾吉可亞頓聖 約翰 馮 巴普迪斯也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John Beaumont was born about 1430, in Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Beaumont, was 32 and his mother, Johanna Lascelles, was 32. He married Elizabeth Cooke in 1456, in St John the Baptist's Church, Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died after 1486, in his hometown, and was buried in St John the Baptist's Church, Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: John Beaumontが約1430年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンで生まれた時，父Henry Beaumontは32歳，母Johanna Lascellesは32歳であった。1456年にイギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチでElizabeth Cookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1486年以後に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアキルクヒートンスト ジョン ス バプティスト'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint John the Baptist's Church, Kirkhea: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Beaumont(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Beaumont(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Lascelles(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1456년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에서 Elizabeth Cooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1486년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 커크히턴 스트 존 테 바프티스트'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cooke em 1456, em St John the Baptist's Church, Kirkheaton, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Saint John the Baptist's Church, Kirkhea: ст джон т баптист'с чурч, кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Beaumont родился около 1430 г. в местности кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Beaumont было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Lascelles, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cooke в 1456 г. в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер после 1486 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности ст джон т баптист'с чурч, кирхитон, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
